title: DashMace
description: A dash mace which can dash like what else is it
body:
# **DashMace**
Turn any Mace into a high-speed directional dash weapon. DashMace lets you convert maces into configurable dash tools — each with its own power, activation key, and cooldown stored directly on the item.

--------------------------------------------------
# 
# **Features**
Convert any Mace into a Dash Mace with /dm create
Launch in your look direction instantly
Per-item settings power, keybind, and cooldown are stored on each mace individually
Preserves existing enchants, name, and lore
Fall damage protection after dashing
Particles and sounds on dash
Full tab completion on all commands
Activation Modes

--------------------------------------------------

# **Keys**

Shift + Right Click |
Shift + Left Click  |
Swap Hand (F key)

--------------------------------------------------

# **Commands**
## Command	Description

- > /dm create	Mark held Mace as a Dash Mace
- > /dm remove	Remove Dash Mace tag
- > /dm info	View held mace settings
- > /dm power <1-50>	Set dash power
- > /dm key <mode>	Set activation key
- > /dm cooldown <seconds>	Set cooldown
- > /dm give <player>	Give a premade Dash Mace
- > /dm reload	Reload config
--------------------------------------------------

# Configuration
Everything is configurable — default power, max power, cooldown, fall damage protection, particles, sounds, and all messages with full color code support.
